message:
feat(obligation,trace): add Lyapunov stability analysis, trace certificates, and explorer refinements

- Add Lyapunov stability analysis module for verifying convergence
  properties of distributed obligation resolution (obligation/lyapunov.rs)
- Add trace certificate module for generating cryptographic attestations
  of trace properties (trace/certificate.rs)
- Refine DPOR explorer backtrack heuristics (lab/explorer.rs)
- Update trace module exports
- Update upgrade log

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
